Hypertension_Aspirin.description: Hypertension outcome in the aspirin group (number of women developing hypertension out of total in aspirin group). This variable and Hypertension_Placebo represent the same outcome measure (hypertension status) for the same sample of 65 women, split by treatment group.

Hypertension_Placebo.description: Hypertension outcome in the placebo group (number of women developing hypertension out of total in placebo group). This variable and Hypertension_Aspirin represent the same outcome measure (hypertension status) for the same sample of 65 women, split by treatment group.
